rules.label: Asset Top Risk >= 4
rules.description: Either asset top-risk model is high

rules.label: Asset Top Risk = 5
rules.description: Either asset top-risk model is red-zone

rules.label: asset_confirmed_risk
rules.description: Asset setup confirmed by price/relative rollover

rules.label: asset_actionable_signal
rules.description: Asset confirmation plus active sector context

rules.label: Asset Top >= 4 AND sector context
rules.description: Leading setup aligned with SOX/VIX/VXN context

reasons: SOX uses the canonical index model and canonical backtest.
Standalone trading history may be short; event-level confidence is limited.
Less than roughly three trading years of evaluated history.
Trading history is short; backtest confidence is limited.
Less than roughly three trading years of evaluated history.
Few confirmed-risk events after de-clustering; interpret hit rates cautiously.

notes: SOX keeps the original canonical fixed -5% backtest in risk_score_backtest.json.
Single stocks/ETFs prioritize volatility-adjusted labels; absolute labels remain available for comparison.
Event-level statistics use a 5-trading-day cooldown per asset.
